content.text:
I mean... it's this place I've been before, up in the Cascades. There's a cabin. And when I'm there I just — I sleep differently, I read actual books, not just articles on my phone at midnight. I feel like myself in a way I don't really feel the rest of the year.

But I don't know if that's a good enough reason to leave my partner holding everything for a week. Is it selfish to want that?
